tasks.title: Create `skills/adv-backend-stack-eval/SKILL.md` — the full backend stack evaluation skill file.
tasks.verification: Skill file located in change worktree. Main checkout no longer has accidental adv-backend-stack-eval file. Harden passed; final skill 200 lines with reviewed metadata.

wisdom.content: ADV worktree policy must be enforced before first mutation. If checkpoint reports branch mismatch (main/trunk instead of change/<id>), treat as blocking: create/resume the change worktree, move only scoped files into it, remove accidental main-checkout copies, then checkpoint from the worktree.

scripts/sync-global.sh currently resolves REPO_SKILLS from canonical REPO_ROOT, not ASSET_ROOT, so worktree-local new skills may not be copied by sync-global until merged into the main checkout. Treat as adjacent tooling issue if validating new skills from a worktree.

proposal.approval_evidence: User confirmed problem statement framing inline. B/F/S scan: 0 CRITICAL, 0 HIGH. Coverage B:C F:C S:C M:N/A.

discovery.approval_evidence: Research validated. Key corrections: name → adv-backend-stack-eval (deployment fix), composition simplified (Phase 0 embedded), project-context gate added (scales evidence bar by project type). Canonical sources secured. User approved findings.

design.approval_evidence: Validator: VALIDATED (clean pass, all 4 dimensions info-level). No user-value tradeoffs, no CONFLICT, no contract-compromise risk. Proceeding to /adv-prep inline.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved vision document inline. 1 task: create SKILL.md + deploy + verify. 0 errors on validation. 14 warnings (proposal-task-drift, expected for single-task skill creation).

execution.approval_evidence: Task tk-bfb64183dbf8 completed. Skill file created at skills/adv-backend-stack-eval/SKILL.md (190 lines, <300 target). Future-proofed: consideration lists (WHAT) not decision matrices (HOW). No hard thresholds or time-bound metrics. Sync verified clean. Checkpoint failed (no worktree, trunk-based additive change).

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered skill after review remediation. Verdict APPROVED; all issue-level findings fixed and re-verified. Proceeding to harden.

release.approval_evidence: User signed off for archive. Worktree violation repaired: change branch worktree created, skill file moved there, accidental main checkout copy removed, checkpoint commit d128be87 created from correct worktree. Harden READY.

clarify_findings.message: Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
